sections.description: Magic path requirements for this bless

commands.name: cost0
commands.description: Minimum skill level in path0 required, also the bless point cost.

commands.name: path1
commands.description: Optional secondary magic path required (-1 to clear).

commands.name: cost1
commands.description: Minimum skill level in path1 required and additional bless point cost.

sections.description: Dominion scale requirements for this bless (max 4)

commands.name: orderscale
commands.description: Requires Order scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: chaosscale
commands.description: Requires Chaos (Turmoil) scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: prodscale
commands.description: Requires Productivity scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: slothscale
commands.description: Requires Sloth scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: heatscale
commands.description: Requires Heat scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: coldscale
commands.description: Requires Cold scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: growthscale
commands.description: Requires Growth scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: deathscale
commands.description: Requires Death scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: luckscale
commands.description: Requires Luck scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: misfortscale
commands.description: Requires Misfortune scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: magicscale
commands.description: Requires Magic scale of this value or higher.

commands.name: drainscale
commands.description: Requires Drain scale of this value or higher.
